title: Missiles
description: The #1 ICBM mod that adds realistic nuclear missiles, radars and explosions to the game!
body:
**Update 0.2**: Project Nuclear [See Changelog here.](https://modrinth.com/datapack/missiles/changelog)

# Missiles
The Missiles Mod/Data pack is an explosive addition to Minecraft, bringing destructive power and thrilling explosions to your gameplay experience. It introduces new weapons, explosives, and mechanics that allow you to unleash devastating attacks and create explosive mayhem in your world.

### Features

- Missiles and explosive devices
- Configurable missile launchers
- Vehicles such as fighter jets
- Brand new [crafting recipes](https://modrinth.com/datapack/missiles/gallery)
- Redstone-ready missile launchers and radars

### Usage

1. Ensure the **Missiles** Mod/Data pack is enabled in your Minecraft world.
2. Acquire or craft the explosive devices and missile launchers.
3. Aim, launch, and trigger your missiles or other explosives to witness massive explosions.

## Contributing

Contributions to the **Missiles** Mod/Data pack are welcome! If you have ideas, suggestions, or bug reports, please open an issue on the [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/heyunahere/missiles-and-explosions/issues) or submit a pull request.
